name: Spiced up Apple Cider Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the margarine and shortening.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating for 1 minute.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating 1½ minutes after each egg.
4. Sift together all dry ingredients.
5. Alternately add the cider and vanilla to the mixture with the butter/margarine, blending well.
6. Pour into a greased 10-inch tube pan.
7. Bake at 235°F for 1½ hours.
CARAMEL GLAZE:
1. Combine sugar, buttermilk, soda, corn syrup, margarine, and vanilla in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a rolling boil over low heat.
3. Continue boiling until thickened, stirring occasionally.
